cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call us today or schedule online for a free estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From minor fixes to major installations, Electrics Contractor Pros offers a full range of electrical services for homes and businesses in Dallas. Our licensed electricians deliver safe, reliable, and code-compliant work every time.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable repairs for outlets, switches, breakers, and more.
services.longDescription: When something goes wrong, you need a pro who can diagnose and fix it right the first time. Our electricians handle everything from flickering lights to dead outlets, using advanced tools to pinpoint issues quickly. We prioritize safety and ensure all repairs meet current code.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue and use diagnostic tools to identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We explain the problem and provide a clear, upfront estimate.

process.title: Completion
process.description: We complete the repair efficiently and test everything to ensure safety.

faqs.question: How much does an electrical repair cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary based on the issue. We provide free estimates so you know the price before any work begins.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency service for urgent electrical problems. Call us anytime.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Rewiring
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel or rewire your home for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: Older homes often need panel upgrades to handle modern loads. Our team replaces outdated panels and rewires homes to meet current safety standards. We handle all permits and inspections, ensuring your system is safe and reliable.

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current system and discuss your needs.

process.title: Permitting
process.description: We handle all necessary permits and schedule inspections.

process.title: Installation
process.description: Our team installs the new panel or wiring with minimal disruption.

faqs.question: When should I upgrade my panel?
faqs.answer: If your panel is over 20 years old, uses fuses, or you experience frequent breaker trips, it's time for an upgrade.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most panel upgrades are completed in one day, though older homes may require additional time.

services.title: Lighting Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Transform your space with custom lighting solutions.
services.longDescription: Good lighting enhances safety, ambiance, and energy efficiency. We design and install interior and exterior lighting, from recessed and track lighting to landscape and security lighting. Our team helps you choose fixtures that match your style and budget.

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, needs, and budget.

process.title: Design Proposal
process.description: We create a layout and recommend fixtures.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install and test all lighting for optimal performance.

faqs.question: Do you install outdoor lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install landscape, patio, and security lighting to enhance your property.

faqs.question: Can you install dimmer switches?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can add dimmers to most existing fixtures for adjustable ambiance.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Reliable electrical solutions for businesses of all sizes.
services.longDescription: Keep your business running with our commercial electrical services. We handle new construction wiring, data cabling, emergency repairs, and energy-efficient upgrades. Our team works around your schedule to minimize downtime and ensure compliance with commercial codes.

process.title: Site Survey
process.description: We assess your facility and identify requirements.

process.title: Project Plan
process.description: We provide a detailed timeline and cost breakdown.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Our crew completes the work efficiently with regular updates.

faqs.question: Do you offer maintenance contracts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer customized maintenance plans to keep your electrical systems in top shape.

faqs.question: Can you handle emergency repairs for businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency service for commercial clients to minimize downtime.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Electricians Since 2009
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and professional electrical services that exceed customer expectations, with transparent pricing and a commitment to quality.
story: Electrics Contractor Pros was founded in 2009 by a team of master electricians who saw a need for honest, high-quality electrical work in the Dallas area. Starting with just a single truck, we built a reputation for reliability and craftsmanship, one job at a time. Over the years, we've grown into a full-service electrical contractor serving thousands of satisfied customers across Dallas and surrounding communities.

Today, we continue that tradition of excellence. Every member of our team is a licensed electrician who takes pride in their work. We invest in ongoing training and the latest tools to deliver superior results. Whether it's a simple outlet repair or a complex commercial installation, we treat every project with the same dedication to safety, quality, and customer satisfaction.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every job is performed to the highest standards to protect your family or business.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We believe in honest communication, transparent pricing, and doing what's right, even when no one is watching.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in our work. Our electricians are skilled professionals dedicated to delivering clean, precise installations.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We listen to your needs, answer your questions, and ensure you're happy with the result.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out the form for a free estimate.
